lastChunkSummary: Matched debugger medium-low candidate func_16000F8C and accepted full ROM SHA. Key shape was a 0x28 local byte buffer addressed as `buf - 8` for output, with an intentional out-of-bounds `buf[0x24]` float scratch to land at stack+0x54; removing the named original-bit local let IDO load float bits into `$v1` and using a named shift result forced `$v0`. Committed as "Match debugger float print helper".
